title: Dense Gooey Jamaican Plantains Hash
description: A hearty, bitter, post-workout Jamaican dish made with whole wheat and cooked in an earthenware vessel. Perfect for a snack or light meal.
instructions: Preheat the donabe over medium heat.
Add the coconut oil and let it melt.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for another minute.
Add the chopped plantains and cook for 5 minutes.
Sprinkle the allspice, thyme, salt, and black pepper over the plantains.
Mix well and let it cook for another 2 minutes.
Add the whole wheat flour and mix until well combined.
Transfer the donabe to the oven and bake at 375°F for 10 minutes.
Remove the donabe from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes.
Serve the dense gooey plantains hash warm.
